scripts.test: echo 'test — not yet implemented; run test:frontend and test:backend separately'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm run format:frontend && npm run format:backend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --workspace=apps/frontend && apps/backend/.venv/bin/ruff format --check apps/backend
scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:backend
scripts.install:backend: python3 -m venv apps/backend/.venv && apps/backend/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r apps/backend/requirements.txt
scripts.ci: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run check && npm run check:design-reference && npm run build:frontend
